class.name: Compound
class.description: [Compound] represents an OCCT compound and supports explicit construction from child [TopoShape] instances. It exposes the number of direct child shapes contained by the compound.

method.name: build_compound
method.description: Builds a compound from the supplied child shapes. Each array item must be a non-null [TopoShape].

method.name: get_child_count
method.description: Returns the number of direct child shapes contained by the compound.
